name: @hojai/cli
description: The HOJAI command-line tool (npx hojai). Manage config, search the marketplace, capture memories, compose LLM context — all from your terminal.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc src/__tests__/index.test.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration --outDir dist

author: HOJAI AI
